issues.description: Missing passive effect: 'If your opponent's Leader has the <Slash> attribute, this Leader gains +1000 power.' Should be a separate Trigger:Always effect with condition LeaderHasType and action PowerBoost.

Condition is incomplete. Effect requires checking both 'Character with cost 5 or more on board' AND 'Once Per Turn' limitation. Current condition only checks HasCardOnBoard but doesn't specify cost requirement.

Actions are missing the final effect: 'you cannot play Character cards during this turn' should add a restriction/status effect. Also missing that DON cards are 'set as active' (already active), not given from hand.
Rest action target is unclear. The DSL shows 'ChooseOwnCharacter' but text says 'You may rest 1 of your cards' - needs explicit target specification.
GiveDon is incorrect. The effect 'set up to 3 of your DON!! cards as active' means activating existing DON, not giving new DON. This may require a different action type or clarification.
